seo.title: Plugin Update Guide - Upgrade the AiToEarn Browser Extension
seo.description: Follow this illustrated guide to download the latest .crx package and update the AiToEarn extension from the extensions management page.
seo.keywords: plugin update, browser extension upgrade, AiToEarn extension, manual update, Chrome extension

hero.title: Plugin Update Guide
hero.description: If AiToEarn says your current extension version is outdated, follow this guide to update it with the latest .crx package.
hero.noticeTitle: Chrome Web Store installs usually do not need manual updates
hero.noticeContent: If you installed the extension from the Chrome Web Store, you normally only need to wait for store review and automatic rollout.

facts.scenarioValue: Users in mainland China who cannot install the extension from the Chrome Web Store, or users who need the latest version immediately.

sections.beforeUpdateDesc: Review the backup notes and confirm your current install method before updating with the .crx package.
sections.stepsDesc: Follow these 7 steps to finish updating the latest extension package.

backupNotice.title: Important Notice
backupNotice.content1: If you previously installed the extension by extracting a .zip package, manually back up your existing extension data first, such as agents and task settings.
backupNotice.content2: The old .zip install method is not compatible with the current one. After installing with the .crx package, you need to manually remove the old .zip-based extension.

checklist.title: Checklist Before Updating
checklist.item1: Close the extension popup, extension details page, and related panels before you start so the browser state can refresh cleanly.
checklist.item2: If you want extra safety, back up your extension data first, such as agents and task settings.

step1.title: Download the latest extension package
step1.content: Use the download entry at the top of the page to get the latest .crx package.
step1.caption: Download the latest extension package

step2.title: Open the download folder
step2.content: Open the folder that contains the extension package you just downloaded.
step2.caption: Open the download folder

step3.title: Open Manage Extensions
step3.content: Go to Chrome's extensions management page to start the manual update.
step3.caption: Open Manage Extensions

step4.title: Enable Developer mode
step4.content: Turn on Developer mode in the top-right corner of the extensions management page.
step4.caption: Enable Developer mode

step5.title: Drag the latest package into the extensions area
step5.content: Drag the downloaded .crx file directly into the extensions management page.
step5.caption: Drag the latest package into the extensions area

step6.title: Click Re-enable to confirm the update
step6.content: When Chrome shows the confirmation dialog, click “Re-enable” to finish updating the extension.
step6.caption: Click Re-enable to confirm the update

step7.title: Turn off Developer mode
step7.content: After the update is complete, you can turn off Developer mode.
step7.caption: Turn off Developer mode
